leadText: Octazooka (Japanese: オクタンほう Okutank Cannon) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation II. Prior to Generation VIII, it was the signature move of Octillery, though other Pokémon could still inherit it via breeding.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Octazooka inflicts damage and has a 50% chance to lower the target's accuracy by one stage. Pokémon with the Bulletproof Ability are immune to Octazooka. Octazooka can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 2 bonus appeal points if Lock-On or Rain Dance was used in the previous turn. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Octazooka inflicts damage and causes the target to be less likely to hit the user. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 15 Agile Strong Power 65 40 100 Accuracy 85% 85% 95% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +8 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Turns 3 2 4 ? ? ? ? Obscures the user Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Octazooka cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad2 An attack that shoots ink. Has a fifty-fifty chance of reducing the target's accuracy. G S C An attack that may reduce accuracy. R S E Colo XD Fires a lump of ink to damage and cut accuracy. FR LG Ink is blasted in the foe's face or eyes to damage and lower accuracy. D P Pt HG SS PBR The user attacks by spraying ink in the foe's face or eyes. It may also lower the target's accuracy. B W B2 W2 The user attacks by spraying ink in the target's face or eyes. It may also lower the target's accuracy. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user attacks by spraying ink in the target's face or eyes. This may also lower the target's accuracy. LA The user sprays ink in the target’s face to inflict damage. Incoming moves also become more likely to miss. S V The user attacks by spraying ink in the target's face. This may also lower the target's accuracy.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It may also lower the target's Accuracy by one level. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It may also reduce the target's accuracy by 1 level. B S L はなれたポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで めいちゅうを １だんかいさげる MD GtI UNUSED S MD It damages a Pokémon, even one far away. It could also cause the Blinker status condition.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The event-exclusive Sableye can learn the move Octazooka, despite being unrelated to Water-type Pokémon or firearms. Its moves were chosen by chief Golgo Matsumoto, who thought it would make the event more fun and unexpected. [ citation needed ]
